compiled_state.title: shim-refs-check pre-commit hook times out at 5s on larger changesets
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: check-shim-refs.sh exceeds the 5s pre-commit timeout when scanning larger diffs. The check passes when given more time (completes in ~10-12s). Workaround: bumped timeout from 5s to 15s in .pre-commit-config.yaml (committed in a5c450d7). Root cause likely: the script scans all files matching plugins/dso/ on every commit rather than only staged files.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). severity=1 (perf), complexity=0 (single script), environment=1 (CI-specific timing), intermittent=0 (deterministic on large diffs).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned (high confidence). Script already supports explicit file args (lines 33-35) but pre-commit hook sends no files (pass_filenames: false), forcing full 183-file scan on every commit.
comments.author: Test
